trigger: CMD1 10-round audit round 1 flagged cmd-boss/cmd.md hardcoding old hash. LEAD verified scope = 19/21 cmd.md files affected.

evidence.root_cause: All 19 cmd.md were generated from same template with hash literal. When Mr.Long updated foundation v2.6.0 body → v2.8.0 (commit c220446) + recomputed INDEX.sha256, no cascade to cmd.md spec files. Any worker re-init would exit 99 (foundation hash mismatch per Rule 5).

action_lead_took: Bulk sed-replaced hash literal in 19 cmd.md files (boundary justification: LEAD authoritative R67; this is maintenance not production content; precedent set by Mr.Long autonomous foundation update cycle 1).
follow_up: If LEAD overstepped scope, revert via git revert. Otherwise: next worker re-init will see hash MATCH and continue normally.
